text.text: You can push this box

F: Attack
SPACE: Jump
WASD: Walk
Double-Tap WASD: Run
Down while on air: Attack downwards
You can collect NUTS and SCREWS
You can collect them with your attack too
There is a hidden area here, just walk left into the wall
This is a loot crate box, you can destroy it with your attack or down-attack
This is a platform that goes up and down
You can drop off this floating tiles by pressing down
But you can't drop off these
Here some of the enemies we have
This is a flying enemy
This is our ladder which you can climb up or down
You can also kill enemies with boxes
Two or more boxes cant be together, otherwize the game will glitch
You can hang in these tiles by jumping and pressing up
If you fall here, it's game over
This is the checkpoint element
We have water physics too
Falling spikes
Platforms have speed, radius and path configurables
Following path
Fall on weight
Fall off on weight
Circular moving
Endless falling platforms
Keep walking
And that's all!
While not moving, press UP or DOWN to move the camera up or down
